```{r gene-composite-dist, fig.height=5}
           vjust = 2.75, hjust = -0.1, colour = .tableau10[5], size = 3.5) +
  annotate("text", x = gc_thr_1,  y = Inf,
           label = sprintf("Top %g%%", params$gene_top1_pct * 100),
           vjust = 3.5,  hjust = -0.1, colour = .tableau10[4], size = 3.5) +
  labs(title = "Gene Composite Score Distribution",
       subtitle = sprintf("Unweighted mean of available gene scores | n = %s genes",
                          format(nrow(gene_df), big.mark = ",")),
       x = "gene_composite_score", y = "Density") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

### Gene Threshold Profiles

```{r gene-threshold-profiles, fig.height=14, fig.width=12}
# Same idea as position-level threshold profiles but for gene-level scores.
# For each top-N% × direction bucket, show overlaid densities of gene sub-scores.

gene_score_cols_tp <- "gene_caas_score"
if (has_rand)     gene_score_cols_tp <- c(gene_score_cols_tp, "gene_rand_score")
if (has_rer)      gene_score_cols_tp <- c(gene_score_cols_tp, "gene_rer_score")
if (has_fade)     gene_score_cols_tp <- c(gene_score_cols_tp, "gene_fade_score")

# Direction per gene is inherited from its top-scoring position
gene_direction_tp <- pos_df %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  slice_max(CAAS_score, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Gene, gene_direction = change_side)

gene_df_dir <- gene_df %>% left_join(gene_direction_tp, by = "Gene")

# Directional subsets: "all" = no filter; "top" = top or both; "bottom" = bottom or both
gene_dir_subsets <- list(
  all    = gene_df_dir,
  top    = gene_df_dir %>% filter(gene_direction %in% c("top",    "both")),
  bottom = gene_df_dir %>% filter(gene_direction %in% c("bottom", "both"))
)

make_gene_threshold_panel <- function(df_dir, pct_label, pct_val, direction) {
  # Threshold is computed within the directional subset, not globally
  thr <- quantile(df_dir$gene_composite_score, 1 - pct_val, na.rm = TRUE)
  subset_df <- df_dir %>% filter(gene_composite_score >= thr)

  if (nrow(subset_df) == 0 || length(gene_score_cols_tp) < 2) {
    return(
      ggplot() +
        annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
                 label = ifelse(nrow(subset_df) == 0, "No genes", "Single score only"),
                 size = 5, colour = "grey50") +
        labs(title = sprintf("Top %s — %s", pct_label, direction),
             x = "Score (0–1)", y = "Density") +
        xlim(0, 1) + theme_minimal()
    )
  }

  long_df <- subset_df %>%
    select(all_of(gene_score_cols_tp)) %>%
    pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Score_type", values_to = "Score") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Score)) %>%
    mutate(Score_type = factor(Score_type, levels = gene_score_cols_tp))

  ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Score, fill = Score_type, colour = Score_type)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.35, linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_fill_manual(values   = .tableau10[seq_along(gene_score_cols_tp)],
                      labels   = sub("gene_", "", sub("_score", "", gene_score_cols_tp))) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = .tableau10[seq_along(gene_score_cols_tp)],
                        labels = sub("gene_", "", sub("_score", "", gene_score_cols_tp))) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0.01, 0)) +
    labs(
      title    = sprintf("Top %s — %s", pct_label, direction),
      subtitle = sprintf("n = %d genes (thr = %.3f)", nrow(subset_df), thr),
      x = "Score (0–1)", y = "Density",
      fill = NULL, colour = NULL
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 9, colour = "grey40"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text     = element_text(size = 8)
    )
}

gene_panels <- list()
for (direction in names(gene_dir_subsets)) {
  df_d <- gene_dir_subsets[[direction]]
  gene_panels[[paste0("10pct_", direction)]] <-
    make_gene_threshold_panel(df_d, "10%", params$gene_top_pct,  direction)
  gene_panels[[paste0("5pct_",  direction)]] <-
    make_gene_threshold_panel(df_d, "5%",  params$gene_top5_pct, direction)
  gene_panels[[paste0("1pct_",  direction)]] <-
    make_gene_threshold_panel(df_d, "1%",  params$gene_top1_pct, direction)
}

gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  gene_panels[["10pct_all"]],    gene_panels[["5pct_all"]],    gene_panels[["1pct_all"]],
  gene_panels[["10pct_top"]],    gene_panels[["5pct_top"]],    gene_panels[["1pct_top"]],
  gene_panels[["10pct_bottom"]], gene_panels[["5pct_bottom"]], gene_panels[["1pct_bottom"]],
  ncol = 3,
  top  = grid::textGrob(
    "Gene score profiles for top-scoring gene subsets (by gene_composite_score)",
    gp = grid::gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 13)
  ),
  left = grid::textGrob(
    "Direction:  all                            top                          bottom",
    rot = 90, gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 9, col = "grey40")
  )
)
```

### Correlation Analysis

```{r correlation-scatter, eval=(nrow(corr_df) > 0), fig.height=14}
# Build scatter matrix of gene-level scores
score_cols <- "gene_caas_score"
if (has_rand)     score_cols <- c(score_cols, "gene_rand_score")
if (has_rer)      score_cols <- c(score_cols, "gene_rer_score")
if (has_fade)     score_cols <- c(score_cols, "gene_fade_score")

if (length(score_cols) >= 2) {
  pairs_df <- gene_df %>%
    select(all_of(score_cols)) %>%
    drop_na()

  # Create pairs plot
  pairs_long <- expand.grid(
    x_var = score_cols, y_var = score_cols,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(x_var != y_var)

  plots <- list()
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pairs_long))) {
    xv <- pairs_long$x_var[i]
    yv <- pairs_long$y_var[i]
    r_info <- corr_df %>%
      filter((score_a == xv & score_b == yv) | (score_a == yv & score_b == xv))
    label <- if (nrow(r_info) > 0) {
      sprintf("r=%.2f / rho=%.2f", r_info$pearson_r[1], r_info$spearman_r[1])
    } else ""

    plots[[length(plots) + 1]] <- ggplot(pairs_df, aes(x = .data[[xv]], y = .data[[yv]])) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = .tableau10[1]) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, colour = .tableau10[4], linewidth = 0.6) +
      annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label,
               hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, colour = .tableau10[4]) +
      labs(x = sub("gene_", "", sub("_score", "", xv)),
           y = sub("gene_", "", sub("_score", "", yv))) +
      theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 9))
  }

  if (length(plots) > 0) {
    gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = plots,
                            ncol = min(length(score_cols) - 1, 3),
                            top = grid::textGrob(
                              "Gene Score Correlations (r = Pearson; rho = Spearman rank correlation)",
                              gp = grid::gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 13)))
  }
}
```

```{r correlation-table, eval=(nrow(corr_df) > 0)}
DT::datatable(
  corr_df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4))),
  rownames = FALSE,
  options  = list(pageLength = 10, dom = "t"),
  caption  = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    "Pairwise correlations between gene-level scores"
  )
)
```

### Top Genes

```{r top-genes-table}
gene_display_cols <- c("Gene", "n_positions", "gene_caas_score")
if (has_rand)     gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols, "gene_rand_score")
if (has_rer)      gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols, "gene_rer_score")
if (has_fade)     gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols, "gene_fade_score")
gene_display_cols <- c(gene_display_cols, "gene_composite_score")

DT::datatable(
  gene_df %>%
    arrange(desc(gene_composite_score)) %>%
    select(all_of(gene_display_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("n_positions"), ~round(., 4))),
  filter    = "top",
  rownames  = FALSE,
  options   = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE),
  caption   = htmltools::tags$caption(
    style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;",
    sprintf("Gene-level scores | Trait: %s", params$traitname)
  )
)
```

---

## Gene-Level Characterisation {.tabset}

This section accumulates PrimateAI-3D signals at the gene level, testing
whether genes with high composite scores tend to concentrate pathogenic
PrimateAI-3D annotations.

> **Note:** PrimateAI-3D scores require an access request to Illumina —
> see illumina.com/science/genomics-research/articles/primateai-3d.html

### Gene VEP Accumulation

`r if (!has_vep_primateai) "> **Note:** PrimateAI-3D scores are not available — gene-level VEP accumulation skipped."`

```{r gene-vep-pai-accum, eval=has_vep_primateai, fig.height=5}
# Per-gene: mean pai_char_score (scheme-weighted pathogenicity).
gene_vep_pai <- pos_vep_pai %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pai_positions  = n(),
    mean_pai_char    = mean(pai_char_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum_pai_char     = sum(pai_char_score,  na.rm = TRUE),
    n_pai_any_signal = sum(!is.na(pai_char_score) & pai_char_score > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  inner_join(gene_df %>% select(Gene, gene_caas_score, gene_composite_score,
                                n_positions),
             by = "Gene")

ggplot(gene_vep_pai, aes(x = gene_composite_score, y = mean_pai_char,
                          size = n_positions, colour = gene_composite_score)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_vep_pai %>% slice_max(mean_pai_char, n = 15, with_ties = FALSE),
    aes(label = Gene), size = 2.8, max.overlaps = 20,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = gc_thr_10, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = .tableau10[3], linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(name = "Gene\nComposite", option = "plasma") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N positions", range = c(1, 8)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Gene Composite Score vs Mean PrimateAI-3D Scheme-Weighted Score",
    subtitle = "Labels: top-15 genes by mean pai_char_score; dashed = composite top 10% threshold",
    x = "Gene Composite Score", y = "Mean pai_char_score per gene"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

```{r gene-vep-pai-top-bar, eval=has_vep_primateai, fig.height=6}
# Top 30 genes by mean pai_char_score, coloured by gene_composite_score
top_pai_genes <- gene_vep_pai %>%
  filter(n_pai_positions >= 2, mean_pai_char > 0) %>%
  slice_max(mean_pai_char, n = 30, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  arrange(mean_pai_char) %>%
  mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = Gene))

ggplot(top_pai_genes, aes(x = mean_pai_char, y = Gene,
                           fill = gene_composite_score)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Gene Composite\nScore", option = "plasma") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 30 Genes by Mean PrimateAI-3D Scheme-Weighted Score",
    subtitle = paste0("Genes with \u2265 2 positions with PAI3D coverage\n",
                      "pai_char_score = \u03a3 scheme_weight \u00d7 max(PAI3D per CAAP group)"),
    x = "Mean pai_char_score", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
```

### Gene FADE Characterisation

`r if (!has_fade) "> **Note:** FADE results are not available — gene-level FADE characterisation skipped."`

```{r gene-fade-characterisation, eval=has_fade, fig.height=5}
gene_fade_df <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_fade_score), !is.na(gene_composite_score))

ggplot(gene_fade_df, aes(x = gene_composite_score, y = gene_fade_score,
                         colour = gene_caas_score, size = n_positions)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "grey35", linewidth = 0.7) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_fade_df %>% slice_max(gene_fade_score, n = 15, with_ties = FALSE),
    aes(label = Gene), size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 20, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(name = "Gene\nCAAS", option = "plasma") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N positions", range = c(1, 7)) +
  labs(
    title = "Gene Composite Score vs FADE Score",
    subtitle = "Labels mark genes with the strongest FADE signal",
    x = "Gene Composite Score", y = "gene_fade_score"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

### Gene Accumulation Characterisation

`r if (!has_rand) "> **Note:** Accumulation-derived gene scores are not available — gene-level accumulation characterisation skipped."`

```{r gene-accum-characterisation, eval=has_rand, fig.height=5}
gene_accum_df <- gene_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_rand_score), !is.na(gene_composite_score))

ggplot(gene_accum_df, aes(x = gene_composite_score, y = gene_rand_score,
                          colour = gene_caas_score, size = n_positions)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, colour = "grey35", linewidth = 0.7) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_accum_df %>% slice_max(gene_rand_score, n = 15, with_ties = FALSE),
    aes(label = Gene), size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 20, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(name = "Gene\nCAAS", option = "plasma") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N positions", range = c(1, 7)) +
  labs(
    title = "Gene Composite Score vs Accumulation Score",
    subtitle = "Labels mark genes with the strongest accumulation-derived randomisation score",
    x = "Gene Composite Score", y = "gene_rand_score"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```


---

## Genomic Accumulation {.tabset}

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates (gene_ensembl_file) are not available for this run — genomic accumulation skipped."`

```{r genomic-setup, eval=has_genomic}
# Join gene_df with genomic coordinates, then annotate with VEP
gene_genomic <- gene_df %>%
  select(Gene, gene_caas_score, gene_composite_score, n_positions) %>%
  inner_join(genomic_raw, by = "Gene") %>%
  # Standardise chromosome labels (remove "chr" prefix if present)
  mutate(
    chr_label = sub("^chr", "", chr),
    # Order chromosomes numerically then X, Y, MT
    chr_num   = suppressWarnings(as.integer(chr_label)),
    chr_order = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(chr_num)       ~ chr_num,
      chr_label == "X"      ~ 23L,
      chr_label == "Y"      ~ 24L,
      chr_label %in% c("MT","M") ~ 25L,
      TRUE                  ~ 26L
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(chr_order, gene_mid)

# Optionally add mean PAI characterisation score
if (has_vep_primateai && exists("gene_vep_pai")) {
  gene_genomic <- gene_genomic %>%
    left_join(gene_vep_pai %>% select(Gene, mean_pai_char),
              by = "Gene")
} else {
  gene_genomic$mean_pai_char <- NA_real_
}

# Build a cumulative x-axis offset per chromosome for a stitched Manhattan view
chr_offsets <- gene_genomic %>%
  group_by(chr_order, chr_label) %>%
  summarise(chr_max = max(gene_end, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(chr_order) %>%
  mutate(offset = cumsum(lag(chr_max, default = 0L)) + (chr_order - 1L) * 5e6L)

gene_genomic <- gene_genomic %>%
  left_join(chr_offsets %>% select(chr_order, offset, chr_label), by = c("chr_order", "chr_label")) %>%
  mutate(manhattan_x = gene_mid + offset)

chr_label_positions <- chr_offsets %>%
  left_join(gene_genomic %>% group_by(chr_order) %>%
              summarise(mid_x = mean(manhattan_x, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
            by = "chr_order")
```

```{r window-helper, eval=has_genomic}
# Helper: tile chromosomes into non-overlapping windows of win_size bp.
# Each gene/position is assigned to the window containing its genomic midpoint.
# Returns a dataframe with one row per window, summarising mean and max score.
make_window_accum <- function(df, score_col,
                               win_size = params$window_size_bp) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      win_id    = floor(gene_mid / win_size),
      win_start = win_id * win_size,
      win_end   = win_start + win_size - 1L,
      win_mid   = win_start + win_size / 2L
    ) %>%
    group_by(chr_order, chr_label, win_id, win_start, win_end, win_mid) %>%
    summarise(
      n_genes    = dplyr::n(),
      mean_score = mean(.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      max_score  = max(.data[[score_col]],  na.rm = TRUE),
      genes      = paste(unique(Gene), collapse = ", "),
      .groups    = "drop"
    )
}

# Stitch window midpoints onto the cumulative chromosome x-axis (same offsets
# as gene_genomic so windows align with the per-gene manhattans above).
stitch_windows <- function(win_df) {
  win_df %>%
    left_join(chr_offsets %>% select(chr_order, offset), by = "chr_order") %>%
    mutate(win_x = win_mid + offset,
           chr_even = chr_order %% 2 == 0)
}
```

### CAAS Score Manhattan

```{r genomic-manhattan-caas, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
# Manhattan-style plot: x = genomic position (stitched), y = gene_caas_score
# Alternating chromosome colours for readability.
gene_genomic <- gene_genomic %>%
  mutate(chr_even = chr_order %% 2 == 0)

ggplot(gene_genomic,
       aes(x = manhattan_x, y = gene_caas_score,
           colour = chr_even, size = n_positions)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = g_thr_10, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.6) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_genomic %>% slice_max(gene_caas_score, n = 20, with_ties = FALSE),
    aes(label = Gene), size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 15,
    show.legend = FALSE, colour = "black"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[1], "TRUE" = .tableau10[2]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N positions", range = c(0.5, 5)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Gene CAAS Score — Manhattan View",
    subtitle = sprintf("%d genes with genomic coordinates | dashed = top %g%% threshold",
                       nrow(gene_genomic), params$gene_top_pct * 100),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "Gene CAAS Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 7, angle = 0),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

### Composite Score Manhattan

```{r genomic-manhattan-composite, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
ggplot(gene_genomic,
       aes(x = manhattan_x, y = gene_composite_score,
           colour = chr_even, size = n_positions)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = gc_thr_10, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.6) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_genomic %>% slice_max(gene_composite_score, n = 20, with_ties = FALSE),
    aes(label = Gene), size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 15,
    show.legend = FALSE, colour = "black"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[1], "TRUE" = .tableau10[2]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "N positions", range = c(0.5, 5)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Gene Composite Score — Manhattan View",
    subtitle = sprintf("dashed = top %g%% threshold", params$gene_top_pct * 100),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "Gene Composite Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 7, angle = 0),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

### PAI3D Signal Manhattan

`r if (!has_vep_primateai) "> **Note:** PrimateAI-3D scores not available — PAI3D Manhattan skipped."`

```{r genomic-manhattan-pai, eval=has_genomic && has_vep_primateai && any(!is.na(gene_genomic$mean_pai_char)), fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
ggplot(gene_genomic %>% filter(!is.na(mean_pai_char)),
       aes(x = manhattan_x, y = gene_composite_score,
           size   = mean_pai_char,
           colour = mean_pai_char)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.70) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = gc_thr_10, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = gene_genomic %>%
      filter(!is.na(mean_pai_char)) %>%
      slice_max(mean_pai_char, n = 20, with_ties = FALSE),
    aes(label = Gene), size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 12,
    show.legend = FALSE, colour = "black"
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(name = "Mean PAI3D\nchar score", option = "inferno") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Mean PAI3D\nchar score", range = c(0.5, 6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(), size = guide_legend()) +
  labs(
    title    = "Gene Composite Score + PrimateAI-3D Characterisation — Manhattan View",
    subtitle = "Bubble size and colour: mean scheme-weighted PAI3D characterisation score across positions",
    x = "Chromosome", y = "Gene Composite Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 7),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

### CAAS Window Accumulation (Positions)

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates not available — position window accumulation skipped."`

```{r pos-window-accum, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
# Tile position-level CAAS scores into genomic windows.
# pos_genomic is built in the pos-caas-manhattan-setup chunk above.
# We use the same pos_chr_offsets to align x-coordinates with the gene-level plots.
win_size_label <- if (params$window_size_bp >= 1e6) {
  sprintf("%g Mb", params$window_size_bp / 1e6)
} else {
  sprintf("%g kb", params$window_size_bp / 1e3)
}

pos_wins <- pos_genomic %>%
  rename(Gene = Gene) %>%
  make_window_accum("CAAS_score", win_size = params$window_size_bp) %>%
  left_join(pos_chr_offsets %>% select(chr_order, offset), by = "chr_order") %>%
  mutate(n_positions = n_genes,
         win_x    = win_mid + offset,
         chr_even = chr_order %% 2 == 0)

# Label the top windows as genomic regions, not gene names
top_pos_wins <- pos_wins %>%
  slice_max(mean_score, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(region_label = sprintf("chr%s:%0.1f-%0.1f Mb", chr_label, win_start / 1e6, win_end / 1e6))

ggplot(pos_wins, aes(x = win_x, y = mean_score, fill = chr_even)) +
  geom_col(width = params$window_size_bp * 0.9, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(y = max_score, colour = chr_even), size = 1.2, alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = top_pos_wins,
    aes(y = max_score, label = sprintf("%s\n(%d positions)", region_label, n_positions)),
    size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 10, colour = "black",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[1], "TRUE" = .tableau10[2]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[3], "TRUE" = .tableau10[4]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = pos_chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = pos_chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = sprintf("Position-Level CAAS Score — %s Window Accumulation", win_size_label),
    subtitle = sprintf("Bars = mean CAAS score per region | Points = max score | %d windows across %d chromosomes",
                       nrow(pos_wins), length(unique(pos_wins$chr_order))),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "CAAS Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 7),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

### CAAS Window Accumulation (Genes)

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates not available — gene-level CAAS window accumulation skipped."`

```{r gene-caas-window-accum, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
gene_caas_wins <- gene_genomic %>%
  make_window_accum("gene_caas_score", win_size = params$window_size_bp) %>%
  stitch_windows()

top_caas_wins <- gene_caas_wins %>%
  slice_max(mean_score, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(region_label = sprintf("chr%s:%0.1f-%0.1f Mb", chr_label, win_start / 1e6, win_end / 1e6))

ggplot(gene_caas_wins, aes(x = win_x, y = mean_score, fill = chr_even)) +
  geom_col(width = params$window_size_bp * 0.9, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(y = max_score, colour = chr_even), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = top_caas_wins,
    aes(y = max_score, label = sprintf("%s\n(%d genes)", region_label, n_genes)),
    size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 10, colour = "black",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[1], "TRUE" = .tableau10[2]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[3], "TRUE" = .tableau10[4]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = sprintf("Gene CAAS Score — %s Window Accumulation", win_size_label),
    subtitle = sprintf("Bars = mean gene_caas_score per region | Points = max | %d windows",
                       nrow(gene_caas_wins)),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "Gene CAAS Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 7),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

### Composite Window Accumulation (Genes)

`r if (!has_genomic) "> **Note:** Genomic coordinates not available — gene-level composite window accumulation skipped."`

```{r gene-composite-window-accum, eval=has_genomic, fig.height=5, fig.width=14}
gene_comp_wins <- gene_genomic %>%
  make_window_accum("gene_composite_score", win_size = params$window_size_bp) %>%
  stitch_windows()

top_comp_wins <- gene_comp_wins %>%
  slice_max(mean_score, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(region_label = sprintf("chr%s:%0.1f-%0.1f Mb", chr_label, win_start / 1e6, win_end / 1e6))

ggplot(gene_comp_wins, aes(x = win_x, y = mean_score, fill = chr_even)) +
  geom_col(width = params$window_size_bp * 0.9, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(aes(y = max_score, colour = chr_even), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = top_comp_wins,
    aes(y = max_score, label = sprintf("%s\n(%d genes)", region_label, n_genes)),
    size = 2.2, max.overlaps = 10, colour = "black",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[1], "TRUE" = .tableau10[2]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = .tableau10[3], "TRUE" = .tableau10[4]),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_label_positions$mid_x,
    labels = chr_label_positions$chr_label,
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = sprintf("Gene Composite Score — %s Window Accumulation", win_size_label),
    subtitle = sprintf("Bars = mean gene_composite_score per region | Points = max | %d windows",
                       nrow(gene_comp_wins)),
    x = "Chromosome", y = "Gene Composite Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 7),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
```

---

## Summary

```{r summary-stats}
n_components <- 4L  # biochem, asr, convergence, parallel

n_gene_components <- 1L  # gene_caas always present
if (has_rand)     n_gene_components <- n_gene_components + 1L
if (has_rer)      n_gene_components <- n_gene_components + 1L
if (has_fade)     n_gene_components <- n_gene_components + 1L

summary_tbl <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Positions scored", "Genes scored",
    "Position-level components", "Gene-level components",
    "CAAS Score (median)", "CAAS Score (top 10% threshold)",
    "Gene Composite (median)", "Gene Composite (top 10% threshold)",
    "FADE available",
    "Randomization available", "RERConverge available",
    "VEP PrimateAI-3D available",
    "Genomic coordinates available"
  ),
  Value = c(
    format(nrow(pos_df), big.mark = ","),
    format(nrow(gene_df), big.mark = ","),
    as.character(n_components),
    as.character(n_gene_components),
    sprintf("%.4f", median(pos_df$CAAS_score, na.rm = TRUE)),
    sprintf("%.4f", thr_10),
    sprintf("%.4f", median(gene_df$gene_composite_score, na.rm = TRUE)),
    sprintf("%.4f", gc_thr_10),
    ifelse(has_fade,         "Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_rand,         "Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_rer,          "Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_vep_primateai,"Yes", "No"),
    ifelse(has_genomic,      "Yes", "No")
  )
)

knitr::kable(summary_tbl, align = c("l", "r"))
```

---

<details>
<summary>Session Info</summary>
```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
</details>
